/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/appleevents.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/error.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/gameendseq.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/gameframe.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/gameinitexit.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/high.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/initexit.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/input.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/interface.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/IsPortListValid.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/main.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/objectCollision.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/objectControl.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/objectPhysics.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/objects.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/packs.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/particlefx.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/pause.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/preferences.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/random.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/register.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/renderframe.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/rle.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/roaddraw.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/screen.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/screenfx.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/sound.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/sprites.c.o CMakeFiles/reckless_drivin.dir/source/textfx.c.o -o reckless_drivin  libmac_stubs.a libgame_resources.a liblzrw.a -lm -lrt
